title: montiastrum howellii
intro: Montiastrum howellii is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Montiastraceae, commonly known as the prickly pearlwort. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Montiastrum howellii include reducing inflammation and improving skin health, as well as its potential to support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Montiastrum howellii typically involve drying and infusing the plant's leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
